parameters.jsCode:
const online = !$json.error && ($json.ready === true || $json.ok === true);
return [{ json: { ok: online, n8n: true, openclaw: online, status: online ? 'online' : 'unavailable', checkedAt: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ organizationId: $json.organizationId, contactId: $json.contactId, providerMessageId: $json.providerMessageId, to: $json.to, action: $json.action, message: $json.message, confidence: $json.confidence, reason: $json.reason, handoffCategory: $json.handoffCategory }) }}
